creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text: In Windows, when you insert a removable drive with a FAT/exFAT filesystem (which is most likely to be found on an SD card from a camera or smartphone), any Windows user can write to it. I think this behavior is expected by users, and quite in line with the absence of file permissions on FAT. So I think we should emulate this behavior in FreeBSD due to the POLA.
